notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 57 CVEs: CVE-2021-33631, CVE-2022-0854, CVE-2022-1016, CVE-2022-1679, CVE-2022-20141, and 52 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
